name: linear-mcp
description: Linear project management — issues, projects, cycles, labels, teams. Official vendor-hosted remote MCP.
author: linear

setup.blurb: Connect to Linear for issue tracking, project management, sprint cycles, and team coordination.
setup.help_text: Linear's hosted MCP uses OAuth2. On first connection, you'll authorise Sidereal to access your Linear workspace via the browser. No API keys or app creation required.

notes: Vendor-hosted remote MCP at mcp.linear.app — no local process. OAuth2 handled by Linear's hosted auth flow. Service mapping is provisional until tools/list is enumerated against the live endpoint. tasks-v1 is a strong fit: issues map to tasks, projects/labels/inbox/create/update/complete all have direct counterparts. Linear's richer concepts (cycles, views, teams, roadmaps) exceed the contract surface.
